title: Genoa, Liguria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Genoa, Liguria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Genoa is a city in Liguria with a population of 560,000. A historic port city on the Italian Riviera, birthplace of Christopher Columbus, with a sprawling old town and world-class aquarium.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
